protocol.input: fixed C-LEG3 old_exact_080_regime response matrix, normal_k=4, anom_k=16 unless overridden
protocol.architecture: R1 scalar response-entry Set/Transformer reader with controlled row/column/rank/role token identity; z_v is pooled contextual token representation
protocol.loss: ROCC-MC = min-distance-to-known-normal-prototypes compactness + trimmed majority-unlabeled compactness + light anti-collapse variance floor
protocol.selection: label-free monitor only; diagnostic AUC/AP forbidden for checkpoint or hyperparameter selection
protocol.diagnostics: AUC/AP, Spearman/top-K overlap with mat_mean/margin, and reference purity are post-training diagnostic-only

p0_rocc_mc_k2_mean_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 2 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, mean pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

p0_rocc_mc_k2_attn_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 2 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, attn pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

p0_rocc_mc_k4_mean_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 4 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, mean pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

p0_rocc_mc_k4_attn_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 4 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, attn pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

p0_rocc_mc_k8_mean_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 8 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, mean pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

p0_rocc_mc_k8_attn_rowcol_rank_lu25.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 8 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, attn pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

cleg3_reference_definition.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.

results.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 2 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, mean pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

rows.definition: P0 ROCC-MC with 2 known-normal prototypes, rowcol_rank token identity, mean pooling, lambda_unlabeled=0.25.

protocol.position_encoding: P0 uses R1 pos_mode=rowcol_rank; scalar response-entry value plus controlled row/column/rank/role embeddings; global scalar normalization from known normals
protocol.objective_change: ROCC-MC score is min squared distance to 2 known-normal response-matrix prototype centers; prototype grouping uses no anomaly labels
protocol.training_labels: known-normal nodes only; all non-known-normal nodes treated as unlabeled for trimmed majority-normal ROCC
protocol.selection_rule: best checkpoint by label-free ROCC monitor, never by diagnostic AUC/AP
protocol.diagnostic_labels: AUC/AP, reference purity, and baseline comparisons are computed after training only
